 // 4 bytes per pixel (BGRA)\n    uint32_t file_size = 54 + image_size;      // Headers + image data\n    \n    // Allocate and initialize the buffer to 0\n    uint8_t* bmp = (uint8_t*)malloc(file_size+2);\n    for (int i = 0; i < 1024; i++) {\n      bmp[i] = 0;\n    }\n    if (!bmp) {\n        fprintf(stderr, \"Memory allocation failed\\n\");\n        return;\n    }\n\n    bmp = bmp+2;\n    \n    // Use uint32_t array for headers (with proper byte offsets)\n    uint16_t* signature = (uint16_t*)bmp;\n    uint32_t* header = (uint32_t*)(bmp + 2);\n    \n    // File header (14 bytes)\n    *signature = 0x4D42;                      // 'BM' in little-endian\n    header[0] = file_size;                    // File size\n    header[1] = 0;                            // Reserved\n    header[2] = 54;                           // Offset to pixel data\n    \n    // DIB header (40 bytes)\n    header[3] = 40;                           // DIB header size\n    header[4] = width;                        // Width\n    header[5] = -height;                      // Height (negative for top-down)\n    \n    // Color planes (16-bit) and bits per pixel (16-bit)\n    uint16_t* color_data = (uint16_t*)(bmp + 26);\n    color_data[0] = 1;                        // Color planes\n    color_data[1] = 32;                       // Bits per pixel (32-bit BGRA)\n    \n    header[7] = 0;                            // No compression\n    header[8] = image_size; >>> 0;\n}\n\nfunction s32(x) {\n  return x | 0;\n}\n\nfunction signExt16(x) {\n  return (x << 16) >> 16;\n}\n\nfunction signExt8(x) {\n  return (x << 24) >> 24;\n}\n\nfunction signExt64From32(x) {\n  return BigInt.asIntN(64, BigInt(s32(x)));\n}\n\nfunction zeroExt64From32(x) {\n  return BigInt(u32(x));\n}\n\nfunction f32ToBits(v) {\n  FPR_BITS_VIEW.setFloat32(0, Math.fround(v), true);\n  return FPR_BITS_VIEW.getUint32(0, true);\n}\n\nfunction bitsToF32(bits) {\n  FPR_BITS_VIEW.setUint32(0, u32(bits), true);\n  return FPR_BITS_VIEW.getFloat32(0, true);\n}\n\nfunction f64ToBits(v) {\n  FPR_BITS_VIEW.setFloat64(0, v, true);\n  return [FPR_BITS_VIEW.getUint32(0, true), FPR_BITS_VIEW.getUint32(4, true)];\n}\n\nfunction bitsToF64(lo, hi) {\n  FPR_BITS_VIEW.setUint32(0, u32(lo), true);\n  FPR_BITS_VIEW.setUint32(4, u32(hi), true);\n  return FPR_BITS_VIEW.getFloat64(0, true);\n}\n\nclass Memory {\n  constructor() {\n    this.pages = new Map();\n    this.lastPageNum = -1;\n    this.lastPage = null;\n  }\n\n  _getPage(pageNum, create) {\n    if (pageNum === this.lastPageNum && this.lastPage) {\n      return this.lastPage;\n    }\n    let page = this.pages.get(pageNum);\n    if (\"'!page && create) {\n      page = Buffer.alloc(PAGE_SIZE);\n      this.pages.set(pageNum, page);\n    }\n    this.lastPageNum = pageNum;\n    this.lastPage = page || null;\n    return page || null;\n  }\n\n  mapBytes(addr, bytes) {\n    let base = u32(addr);\n    for (let i = 0; i < bytes.length; i++) {\n      this.write8(base + i, bytes[i]);\n    }\n  }\n\n  read8(addr) {\n    const a = u32(addr);\n    const page = this._getPage(a >>> PAGE_BITS, false);\n    if (!page) {\n      return 0;\n    }\n    return page[a & PAGE_MASK];\n  }\n\n  write8(addr, value) {\n    const a = u32(addr);\n    const page = this._getPage(a >>> PAGE_BITS, true);\n    page[a & PAGE_MASK] = value & 0xff;\n  }\n\n  read16(addr) {\n    const a = u32(addr);\n    return this.read8(a) | (this.read8(a + 1) << 8);\n  }\n\n  write16(addr, value) {\n    const a = u32(addr);\n    const v = value & 0xffff;\n    this.write8(a, v & 0xff);\n    this.write8(a + 1, (v >>> 8) & 0xff);\n  }\n\n  read32(addr) {\n    const a = u32(addr);\n    return u32(\n      this.read8(a) |\n      (this.read8(a + 1) << 8) |\n      (this.read8(a + 2) << 16) |\n      (this.read8(a + 3) << 24)\n    );\n  }\n\n  write32(addr, value) {\n    const a = u32(addr);\n    const v = u32(value);\n    this.write8(a, v & 0xff);\n    this.write8(a + 1, (v >>> 8) & 0xff);\n    this.write8(a + 2, (v >>> 16) & 0xff);\n    this.write8(a + 3, (v >>> 24) & 0xff);\n  }\n\n  read64(addr) {\n    const lo = this.read32(addr);\n    const hi = this.read32(u32(addr + 4));\n    return [lo, hi];\n  }\n\n  write64(addr, lo, hi) {\n    this.write32(addr, lo);\n    this.write32(u32(addr + 4), hi);\n  }\n\n  readBytes(addr, len) {\n    const out = Buffer.alloc(len);\n    let a = u32(addr);\n    for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {\n      out[i] = this.read8(a + i);\n    }\n    return out;\n  }\n\n  writeBytes(addr, buf) {\n    let a = u32(addr);\n    for (let i = 0; i < buf.length; i++) {\n      this.write8(a + i, buf[i]);\n    }\n  }\n\n  readCString(addr, maxLen = 4096) {\n    let a = u32(addr);\n    const out = [];\n    for (let i = 0; i < maxLen; i++) {\n      const b = this.read8(a + i);\n      if (b === 0) {\n        break;\n      }\n      out.push(b);\n    }\n    return Buffer.from(out).toString('\"'utf8');\n  }\n}\n\nclass SyscallLayer {\n  constructor(vm, opts) {\n    this.vm = vm;\n    this.cwd = opts.cwd;\n    this.framePath = '/tmp/frame.bmp';\n    this.frameDir = path.join(this.cwd, 'frames');\n    this.frameCounter = 0;\n    this.maxFrames = opts.maxFrames;\n    this.fdTable = new Map();\n    this.nextFd = 3;\n\n    try {\n      fs.mkdirSync(this.frameDir, { recursive: true });\n    } catch {\n      // ignore\n    }\n  }\n\n  _resolvePath(raw) {\n    if (\"'!raw) return '\"'';\n    if (path.isAbsolute(raw)) return raw;\n    return path.join(this.cwd, raw);\n  }\n\n  _allocFd(entry) {\n    while (this.fdTable.has(this.nextFd)) {\n      this.nextFd++;\n    }\n    const fd = this.nextFd;\n    this.fdTable.set(fd, entry);\n    this.nextFd++;\n    return fd;\n  }\n\n  _errnoFromNode(err) {\n    switch (err && err.code) {\n      case 'ENOENT': return ENOENT;\n      case 'EACCES': return EACCES;\n      case 'EEXIST': return EEXIST;\n      case 'EISDIR': return EISDIR;\n      case 'EBADF': return EBADF;\n      case 'EINVAL': return EINVAL;\n      default: return EINVAL;\n    }\n  }\n\n  _storeFrameSnapshot() {\n    this.frameCounter += 1;\n    const outName = \"'`frame_${String(this.frameCounter).padStart(6, '\"'0')}.bmp\"'`;\n    const outPath = path.join(this.frameDir, outName);\n    try {\n      fs.copyFileSync(this.framePath, outPath);\n      process.stdout.write(`saved ${outPath}'\"\\\\n\"'`);\n    } catch (err) {\n      process.stderr.write(`failed to copy frame: ${err.message}'\"\\\\n\"'`);\n    }\n    if (this.maxFrames > 0 && this.frameCounter >= this.maxFrames) {\n      this.vm.halted = true;\n      this.vm.exitCode = 0;\n    }\n  }\n\n  handle(sysno, a0, a1, a2, a3, a4, a5) {\n    try {\n      switch (sysno) {\n        case SYS_READ: {\n          const fd = s32(a0);\n          const bufPtr = u32(a1);\n          const count = u32(a2);\n          if (count === 0) return 0;\n          if (fd === 0) {\n            return 0;\n          }\n          const ent = this.fdTable.get(fd);\n          if (!ent) return -EBADF;\n          const buf = Buffer.alloc(count);\n          const n = fs.readSync(ent.hostFd, buf, 0, count, ent.offset);\n          if (n > 0) {\n            this.vm.mem.writeBytes(bufPtr, buf.subarray(0, n));\n            ent.offset += n;\n          }\n          return n;\n        }\n        case SYS_WRITE: {\n          const fd = s32(a0);\n          const bufPtr = u32(a1);\n          const count = u32(a2);\n          if (count === 0) return 0;\n          const data = this.vm.mem.readBytes(bufPtr, count);\n          if (fd === 1 || fd === 0) {\n            fs.writeSync(process.stdout.fd, data);\n            return count;\n          }\n          if (fd === 2) {\n            fs.writeSync(process.stderr.fd, data);\n            return count;\n          }\n          const ent = this.fdTable.get(fd);\n          if (!ent) return -EBADF;\n          const n = fs.writeSync(ent.hostFd, data, 0, count, ent.offset);\n          ent.offset += n;\n          ent.wrote = ent.wrote || n > 0;\n          return n;\n        }\n        case SYS_OPEN: {\n          const pathPtr = u32(a0);\n          const flags = s32(a1);\n          const mode = u32(a2);\n          const rawPath = this.vm.mem.readCString(pathPtr);\n          const realPath = this._resolvePath(rawPath);\n          const hostFd = fs.openSync(realPath, flags, mode);\n          let initialOffset = 0;\n          if ((flags & 1024) !== 0) {\n            initialOffset = fs.fstatSync(hostFd).size;\n          }\n          const vmFd = this._allocFd({\n            hostFd,\n            offset: initialOffset,\n            path: realPath,\n            wrote: false,\n            isFrame: realPath === this.framePath,\n          });\n          return vmFd;\n        }\n        case SYS_CLOSE: {\n          const fd = s32(a0);\n          const ent = this.fdTable.get(fd);\n          if (!ent) return -EBADF;\n          fs.closeSync(ent.hostFd);\n          this.fdTable.delete(fd);\n          if (ent.isFrame && ent.wrote) {\n            this._storeFrameSnapshot();\n          }\n          return 0;\n        }\n        case SYS_LSEEK: {\n          const fd = s32(a0);\n          const off = s32(a1);\n          const whence = s32(a2);\n          const ent = this.fdTable.get(fd);\n          if (!ent) return -EBADF;\n          let next;\n          if (whence === SEEK_SET) {\n            next = off;\n          } else if (whence === SEEK_CUR) {\n            next = ent.offset + off;\n          } else if (whence === SEEK_END) {\n            const sz = fs.fstatSync(ent.hostFd).size;\n            next = sz + off;\n          } else {\n            return -EINVAL;\n          }\n          if (next < 0) return -EINVAL;\n          ent.offset = next;\n          return next | 0;\n        }\n        case SYS_FSYNC: {\n          const fd = s32(a0);\n          const ent = this.fdTable.get(fd);\n          if (!ent) return -EBADF;\n          fs.fsyncSync(ent.hostFd);\n          return 0;\n        }\n        case SYS_RENAME: {\n          const oldPath = this._resolvePath(this.vm.mem.readCString(u32(a0)));\n          const newPath = this._resolvePath(this.vm.mem.readCString(u32(a1)));\n          fs.renameSync(oldPath, newPath);\n          return 0;\n        }\n        case SYS_MKDIR: {\n          const p = this._resolvePath(this.vm.mem.readCString(u32(a0)));\n          const mode = u32(a1);\n          fs.mkdirSync(p, { mode });\n          return 0;\n        }\n        case SYS_UNLINK: {\n          const p = this._resolvePath(this.vm.mem.readCString(u32(a0)));\n          fs.unlinkSync(p);\n          return 0;\n        }\n        case SYS_TIME: {\n          const outPtr = u32(a0);\n          const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) | 0;\n          if (outPtr !== 0) {\n            this.vm.mem.write32(outPtr, now);\n          }\n          return now;\n        }\n        case SYS_EXIT: {\n          this.vm.halted = true;\n          this.vm.exitCode = s32(a0);\n          return 0;\n        }\n        default: {\n          process.stderr.write(`unhandled syscall ${sysno}(${a0},${a1},${a2},${a3},${a4},${a5})'\"\\\\n\"'`);\n          return -ENOSYS;\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      return -this._errnoFromNode(err);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nclass MipsVM {\n  constructor(memory, entryPoint, opts) {\n    this.mem = memory;\n    this.regs = new Uint32Array(32);\n    this.fprLo = new Uint32Array(32);\n    this.fprHi = new Uint32Array(32);\n    this.fcc0 = false;\n    this.hi = 0;\n    this.lo = 0;\n    this.pc = u32(entryPoint);\n    this.halted = false;\n    this.exitCode = 0;\n    this.steps = 0;\n    this.startMs = Date.now();\n    this.lastReportMs = this.startMs;\n    this.lastReportSteps = 0;\n    this.progress = Boolean(opts.progress);\n\n    this.regs[29] = 0x7fff0000; // $sp\n    this.sys = new SyscallLayer(this, {\n      cwd: opts.cwd,\n      maxFrames: opts.maxFrames,\n    });\n  }\n\n  setReg(idx, val) {\n    if (idx !== 0) {\n      this.regs[idx] = u32(val);\n    }\n  }\n\n  getF64(idx) {\n    return bitsToF64(this.fprLo[idx], this.fprHi[idx]);\n  }\n\n  setF64(idx, val) {\n    const [lo, hi] = f64ToBits(val);\n    this.fprLo[idx] = lo;\n    this.fprHi[idx] = hi;\n  }\n\n  getF32(idx) {\n    return bitsToF32(this.fprLo[idx]);\n  }\n\n  setF32(idx, val) {\n    this.fprLo[idx] = f32ToBits(val);\n  }\n\n  executeInstruction(pc, instr, inDelaySlot) {\n    const op = instr >>> 26;\n    const rs = (instr >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n    const rt = (instr >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n    const rd = (instr >>> 11) & 0x1f;\n    const sa = (instr >>> 6) & 0x1f;\n    const funct = instr & 0x3f;\n    const imm = instr & 0xffff;\n    const simm = signExt16(imm);\n\n    switch (op) {\n      case 0x00: {\n        switch (funct) {\n          case 0x00: // sll\n            this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rt] << sa);\n            return null;\n          case 0x02: { // srl/rotr\n            if (rs === 1) {\n              const v = this.regs[rt];\n              this.setReg(rd, (v >>> sa) | (v << (32 - sa)));\n            } else {\n              this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rt] >>> sa);\n            }\n            return null;\n          }\n          case 0x03: // sra\n            this.setReg(rd, s32(this.regs[rt]) >> sa);\n            return null;\n          case 0x04: // sllv\n            this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rt] << (this.regs[rs] & 31));\n            return null;\n          case 0x06: // srlv\n            this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rt] >>> (this.regs[rs] & 31));\n            return null;\n          case 0x07: // srav\n            this.setReg(rd, s32(this.regs[rt]) >> (this.regs[rs] & 31));\n            return null;\n          case 0x08: { // jr\n            const target = this.regs[rs];\n            return { taken: true, target };\n          }\n          case 0x09: { // jalr\n            const target = this.regs[rs];\n            const link = u32(pc + 8);\n            this.setReg(rd === 0 ? 31 : rd, link);\n            return { taken: true, target };\n          }\n          case 0x0a: // movz\n            if (this.regs[rt] === 0) this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rs]);\n            return null;\n          case 0x0b: // movn\n            if (this.regs[rt] !== 0) this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rs]);\n            return null;\n          case 0x0c: { // syscall\n            const ret = this.sys.handle(\n              this.regs[2] | 0,\n              this.regs[4],\n              this.regs[5],\n              this.regs[6],\n              this.regs[7],\n              this.regs[8],\n              this.regs[9]\n            );\n            this.setReg(2, ret);\n            return null;\n          }\n          case 0x10: // mfhi\n            this.setReg(rd, this.hi);\n            return null;\n          case 0x12: // mflo\n            this.setReg(rd, this.lo);\n            return null;\n          case 0x18: { // mult\n            const prod = signExt64From32(this.regs[rs]) * write32(addr, value) {\n    const a = u32(addr);\n    const v = u32(value);\n    this.write8(a, v & 0xff);\n    this.write8(a + 1, (v >>> 8) & 0xff);\n    this.write8(a + 2, (v >>> 16) & 0xff);\n    this.write8(a + 3, (v >>> 24) & 0xff);\n  }\n\n  read64(addr) {\n    const lo = this.read32(addr);\n    const hi = this.read32(u32(addr + 4));\n    return [lo, hi];\n  }\n\n  write64(addr, lo, hi) {\n    this.write32(addr, lo);\n    this.write32(u32(addr + 4), hi);\n  }\n\n  readBytes(addr, len) {\n    const out = Buffer.alloc(len);\n    let a = u32(addr);\n    for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {\n      out[i] = this.read8(a + i);\n    }\n    return out;\n  }\n\n  writeBytes(addr, buf) {\n    let a = u32(addr);\n    for (let i = 0; i < buf.length; i++) {\n      this.write8(a + i, buf[i]);\n    }\n  }\n\n  readCString(addr, maxLen = 4096) {\n    let a = u32(addr);\n    const out = [];\n    for (let i = 0; i < maxLen; i++) {\n      const b = this.read8(a + i);\n      if (b === 0) {\n        break;\n      }\n      out.push(b);\n    }\n    return Buffer.from(out).toString('\"'utf8');\n  }\n}\n\nclass SyscallLayer {\n  constructor(vm, opts) {\n    this.vm = vm;\n    this.cwd = opts.cwd;\n    this.framePath = '/tmp/frame.bmp';\n    this.frameDir = path.join(this.cwd, 'frames');\n    this.frameCounter = 0;\n    this.maxFrames = opts.maxFrames;\n    this.fdTable = new Map();\n    this.nextFd = 3;\n\n    try {\n      fs.mkdirSync(this.frameDir, { recursive: true });\n    } catch {\n      // ignore\n    }\n  }\n\n  _resolvePath(raw) {\n    if (\"'!raw) return '\"'';\n    if (path.isAbsolute(raw)) return raw;\n    return path.join(this.cwd, raw);\n  }\n\n  _allocFd(entry) {\n    while (this.fdTable.has(this.nextFd)) {\n      this.nextFd++;\n    }\n    const fd = this.nextFd;\n    this.fdTable.set(fd, entry);\n    this.nextFd++;\n    return fd;\n  }\n\n  _errnoFromNode(err) {\n    switch (err && err.code) {\n      case 'ENOENT': return ENOENT;\n      case 'EACCES': return EACCES;\n      case 'EEXIST': return EEXIST;\n      case 'EISDIR': return EISDIR;\n      case 'EBADF': return EBADF;\n      case 'EINVAL': return EINVAL;\n      default: return EINVAL;\n    }\n  }\n\n  _storeFrameSnapshot() {\n    this.frameCounter += 1;\n    const outName = \"'`frame_${String(this.frameCounter).padStart(6, '\"'0')}.bmp\"'`;\n    const outPath = path.join(this.frameDir, outName);\n    try {\n      fs.copyFileSync(this.framePath, outPath);\n      process.stdout.write(`saved ${outPath}'\"\\\\n\"'`);\n    } catch (err) {\n      process.stderr.write(`failed to copy frame: ${err.message}'\"\\\\n\"'`);\n    }\n    if (this.maxFrames > 0 && this.frameCounter >= this.maxFrames) {\n      this.vm.halted = true;\n      this.vm.exitCode = 0;\n    }\n  }\n\n  handle(sysno, a0, a1, a2, a3, a4, a5) {\n    try {\n      switch (sysno) {\n        case SYS_READ: {\n          const fd = s32(a0);\n          const bufPtr = u32(a1);\n          const count = u32(a2);\n          if (count === 0) return 0;\n          if (fd === 0) {\n            return 0;\n          }\n          const ent = this.fdTable.get(fd);\n          if (!ent) return -EBADF;\n          const buf = Buffer.alloc(count);\n          const n = fs.readSync(ent.hostFd, buf, 0, count, ent.offset);\n          if (n > 0) {\n            this.vm.mem.writeBytes(bufPtr, buf.subarray(0, n));\n            ent.offset += n;\n          }\n          return n;\n        }\n        case SYS_WRITE: {\n          const fd = s32(a0);\n          const bufPtr = u32(a1);\n          const count = u32(a2);\n          if (count === 0) return 0;\n          const data = this.vm.mem.readBytes(bufPtr, count);\n          if (fd === 1 || fd === 0) {\n            fs.writeSync(process.stdout.fd, data);\n            return count;\n          }\n          if (fd === 2) {\n            fs.writeSync(process.stderr.fd, data);\n            return count;\n          }\n          const ent = this.fdTable.get(fd);\n          if (!ent) return -EBADF;\n          const n = fs.writeSync(ent.hostFd, data, 0, count, ent.offset);\n          ent.offset += n;\n          ent.wrote = ent.wrote || n > 0;\n          return n;\n        }\n        case SYS_OPEN: {\n          const pathPtr = u32(a0);\n          const flags = s32(a1);\n          const mode = u32(a2);\n          const rawPath = this.vm.mem.readCString(pathPtr);\n          const realPath = this._resolvePath(rawPath);\n          const hostFd = fs.openSync(realPath, flags, mode);\n          let initialOffset = 0;\n          if ((flags & 1024) !== 0) {\n            initialOffset = fs.fstatSync(hostFd).size;\n          }\n          const vmFd = this._allocFd({\n            hostFd,\n            offset: initialOffset,\n            path: realPath,\n            wrote: false,\n            isFrame: realPath === this.framePath,\n          });\n          return vmFd;\n        }\n        case SYS_CLOSE: {\n          const fd = s32(a0);\n          const ent = this.fdTable.get(fd);\n          if (!ent) return -EBADF;\n          fs.closeSync(ent.hostFd);\n          this.fdTable.delete(fd);\n          if (ent.isFrame && ent.wrote) {\n            this._storeFrameSnapshot();\n          }\n          return 0;\n        }\n        case SYS_LSEEK: {\n          const fd = s32(a0);\n          const off = s32(a1);\n          const whence = s32(a2);\n          const ent = this.fdTable.get(fd);\n          if (!ent) return -EBADF;\n          let next;\n          if (whence === SEEK_SET) {\n            next = off;\n          } else if (whence === SEEK_CUR) {\n            next = ent.offset + off;\n          } else if (whence === SEEK_END) {\n            const sz = fs.fstatSync(ent.hostFd).size;\n            next = sz + off;\n          } else {\n            return -EINVAL;\n          }\n          if (next < 0) return -EINVAL;\n          ent.offset = next;\n          return next | 0;\n        }\n        case SYS_FSYNC: {\n          const fd = s32(a0);\n          const ent = this.fdTable.get(fd);\n          if (!ent) return -EBADF;\n          fs.fsyncSync(ent.hostFd);\n          return 0;\n        }\n        case SYS_RENAME: {\n          const oldPath = this._resolvePath(this.vm.mem.readCString(u32(a0)));\n          const newPath = this._resolvePath(this.vm.mem.readCString(u32(a1)));\n          fs.renameSync(oldPath, newPath);\n          return 0;\n        }\n        case SYS_MKDIR: {\n          const p = this._resolvePath(this.vm.mem.readCString(u32(a0)));\n          const mode = u32(a1);\n          fs.mkdirSync(p, { mode });\n          return 0;\n        }\n        case SYS_UNLINK: {\n          const p = this._resolvePath(this.vm.mem.readCString(u32(a0)));\n          fs.unlinkSync(p);\n          return 0;\n        }\n        case SYS_TIME: {\n          const outPtr = u32(a0);\n          const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) | 0;\n          if (outPtr !== 0) {\n            this.vm.mem.write32(outPtr, now);\n          }\n          return now;\n        }\n        case SYS_EXIT: {\n          this.vm.halted = true;\n          this.vm.exitCode = s32(a0);\n          return 0;\n        }\n        default: {\n          process.stderr.write(`unhandled syscall ${sysno}(${a0},${a1},${a2},${a3},${a4},${a5})'\"\\\\n\"'`);\n          return -ENOSYS;\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      return -this._errnoFromNode(err);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nclass MipsVM {\n  constructor(memory, entryPoint, opts) {\n    this.mem = memory;\n    this.regs = new Uint32Array(32);\n    this.fprLo = new Uint32Array(32);\n    this.fprHi = new Uint32Array(32);\n    this.fcc0 = false;\n    this.hi = 0;\n    this.lo = 0;\n    this.pc = u32(entryPoint);\n    this.halted = false;\n    this.exitCode = 0;\n    this.steps = 0;\n    this.startMs = Date.now();\n    this.lastReportMs = this.startMs;\n    this.lastReportSteps = 0;\n    this.progress = Boolean(opts.progress);\n\n    this.regs[29] = 0x7fff0000; // $sp\n    this.sys = new SyscallLayer(this, {\n      cwd: opts.cwd,\n      maxFrames: opts.maxFrames,\n    });\n  }\n\n  setReg(idx, val) {\n    if (idx !== 0) {\n      this.regs[idx] = u32(val);\n    }\n  }\n\n  getF64(idx) {\n    return bitsToF64(this.fprLo[idx], this.fprHi[idx]);\n  }\n\n  setF64(idx, val) {\n    const [lo, hi] = f64ToBits(val);\n    this.fprLo[idx] = lo;\n    this.fprHi[idx] = hi;\n  }\n\n  getF32(idx) {\n    return bitsToF32(this.fprLo[idx]);\n  }\n\n  setF32(idx, val) {\n    this.fprLo[idx] = f32ToBits(val);\n  }\n\n  executeInstruction(pc, instr, inDelaySlot) {\n    const op = instr >>> 26;\n    const rs = (instr >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n    const rt = (instr >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n    const rd = (instr >>> 11) & 0x1f;\n    const sa = (instr >>> 6) & 0x1f;\n    const funct = instr & 0x3f;\n    const imm = instr & 0xffff;\n    const simm = signExt16(imm);\n\n    switch (op) {\n      case 0x00: {\n        switch (funct) {\n          case 0x00: // sll\n            this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rt] << sa);\n            return null;\n          case 0x02: { // srl/rotr\n            if (rs === 1) {\n              const v = this.regs[rt];\n              this.setReg(rd, (v >>> sa) | (v << (32 - sa)));\n            } else {\n              this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rt] >>> sa);\n            }\n            return null;\n          }\n          case 0x03: // sra\n            this.setReg(rd, s32(this.regs[rt]) >> sa);\n            return null;\n          case 0x04: // sllv\n            this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rt] << (this.regs[rs] & 31));\n            return null;\n          case 0x06: // srlv\n            this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rt] >>> (this.regs[rs] & 31));\n            return null;\n          case 0x07: // srav\n            this.setReg(rd, s32(this.regs[rt]) >> (this.regs[rs] & 31));\n            return null;\n          case 0x08: { // jr\n            const target = this.regs[rs];\n            return { taken: true, target };\n          }\n          case 0x09: { // jalr\n            const target = this.regs[rs];\n            const link = u32(pc + 8);\n            this.setReg(rd === 0 ? 31 : rd, link);\n            return { taken: true, target };\n          }\n          case 0x0a: // movz\n            if (this.regs[rt] === 0) this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rs]);\n            return null;\n          case 0x0b: // movn\n            if (this.regs[rt] !== 0) this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rs]);\n            return null;\n          case 0x0c: { // syscall\n            const ret = this.sys.handle(\n              this.regs[2] | 0,\n              this.regs[4],\n              this.regs[5],\n              this.regs[6],\n              this.regs[7],\n              this.regs[8],\n              this.regs[9]\n            );\n            this.setReg(2, ret);\n            return null;\n          }\n          case 0x10: // mfhi\n            this.setReg(rd, this.hi);\n            return null;\n          case 0x12: // mflo\n            this.setReg(rd, this.lo);\n            return null;\n          case 0x18: { // mult\n            const prod = signExt64From32(this.regs[rs]) * signExt64From32(this.regs[rt]);\n            this.lo = Number(prod & 0xffffffffn) >>> 0;\n            this.hi = Number((prod >> 32n) & 0xffffffffn) >>> 0;\n            return null;\n          }\n          case 0x19: { // multu\n            const prod = zeroExt64From32(this.regs[rs]) * zeroExt64From32(this.regs[rt]);\n            this.lo = Number(prod & 0xffffffffn) >>> 0;\n            this.hi = Number((prod >> 32n) & 0xffffffffn) >>> 0;\n            return null;\n          }\n          case 0x1a: { // div\n            const num = s32(this.regs[rs]);\n            const den = s32(this.regs[rt]);\n            if (den !== 0) {\n              this.lo = u32(Math.trunc(num / den));\n              this.hi = u32(num % den);\n            }\n            return null;\n          }\n          case 0x1b: { // divu\n            const num = this.regs[rs] >>> 0;\n            const den = this.regs[rt] >>> 0;\n            if (den !== 0) {\n              this.lo = u32(Math.trunc(num / den));\n              this.hi = u32(num % den);\n            }\n            return null;\n          }\n          case 0x21: // addu\n            this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rs] + this.regs[rt]);\n            return null;\n          case 0x23: // subu\n            this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rs] - this.regs[rt]);\n            return null;\n          case 0x24: // and\n            this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rs] & this.regs[rt]);\n            return null;\n          case 0x25: // or\n            this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rs] | this.regs[rt]);\n            return null;\n          case 0x26: // xor\n            this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rs] ''^ this.regs[rt]);\n            return null;\n          case 0x27: // nor\n            this.setReg(rd, ~(this.regs[rs] | this.regs[rt]));\n            return null;\n          case 0x2a: // slt\n            this.setReg(rd, s32(this.regs[rs]) < s32(this.regs[rt]) ? 1 : 0);\n            return null;\n          case 0x2b: // sltu\n            this.setReg(rd, this.regs[rs] < this.regs[rt] ? 1 : 0);\n            return null;\n          case 0x34: // teq\n            if (this.regs[rs] === this.regs[rt]) {\n              throw new Error(`TEQ trap at 0x${pc.toString(16)}`);\n            }\n            return null;\n          default:\n            throw new Error(`Unsupported SPECIAL funct 0x${funct.toString(16)} at 0x${pc.toString(16)}`);\n        }\n      }\n      case 0x01: { // regimm\n        const target = u32(pc + 4 + ((simm << 2) | 0));\n        if (rt === 0x00) {\n          return { taken: s32(this.regs[rs]) < 0, target };\n        }\n        if (rt === 0x01) {\n          return { taken: s32(this.regs[rs]) >= 0, target };\n        }\n        throw new Error(`Unsupported REGIMM rt ${rt} at 0x${pc.toString(16)}`);\n      }\n      case 0x02: { // j\n        const target = u32(((pc + 4) & 0xf0000000) | ((instr & 0x03ffffff) << 2));\n        return { taken: true, target };\n      }\n      case 0x03: { // jal\n        const target = u32(((pc + 4) & 0xf0000000) | ((instr & 0x03ffffff) << 2));\n        this.setReg(31, u32(pc + 8));\n        return { taken: true, target };\n      }\n      case 0x04: { // beq\n        const target = u32(pc + 4 + ((simm << 2) | 0));\n        return { taken: this.regs[rs] === this.regs[rt], target };\n      }\n      case 0x05: { // bne\n        const target = u32(pc + 4 + ((simm << 2) | 0));\n        return { taken: this.regs[rs] !== this.regs[rt], target };\n      }\n      case 0x06: { // blez\n        const target = u32(pc + 4 + ((simm << 2) | 0));\n        return { taken: s32(this.regs[rs]) <= 0, target };\n      }\n      case 0x07: { // bgtz\n        const target = u32(pc + 4 + ((simm << 2) | 0));\n        return { taken: s32(this.regs[rs]) > 0, target };\n      }\n      case 0x09: // addiu\n        this.setReg(rt, this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        return null;\n      case 0x0a: // slti\n        this.setReg(rt, s32(this.regs[rs]) < simm ? 1 : 0);\n        return null;\n      case 0x0b: // sltiu\n        this.setReg(rt, this.regs[rs] < u32(simm) ? 1 : 0);\n        return null;\n      case 0x0c: // andi\n        this.setReg(rt, this.regs[rs] & imm);\n        return null;\n      case 0x0d: // ori\n        this.setReg(rt, this.regs[rs] | imm);\n        return null;\n      case 0x0e: // xori\n        this.setReg(rt, this.regs[rs] ''^ imm);\n        return null;\n      case 0x0f: // lui\n        this.setReg(rt, imm << 16);\n        return null;\n      case 0x11: { // COP1\n        const fmt = rs;\n        if (fmt === 0x00) { // mfc1\n          this.setReg(rt, this.fprLo[rd]);\n          return null;\n        }\n        if (fmt === 0x04) { // mtc1\n          this.fprLo[rd] = this.regs[rt];\n          return null;\n        }\n        if (fmt === 0x07) { // mthc1\n          this.fprHi[rd] = this.regs[rt];\n          return null;\n        }\n        if (fmt === 0x08) { // bc1*\n          const ccBranch = rt;\n          const target = u32(pc + 4 + ((simm << 2) | 0));\n          if (ccBranch === 0x01) { // bc1t\n            return { taken: this.fcc0, target };\n          }\n          throw new Error(`Unsupported BC1 rt=0x${ccBranch.toString(16)} at 0x${pc.toString(16)}`);\n        }\n\n        const ft = rt;\n        const fs = rd;\n        const fd = sa;\n\n        if (fmt === 0x10) { // single\n          switch (funct) {\n            case 0x00: // add.s\n              this.setF32(fd, this.getF32(fs) + this.getF32(ft));\n              return null;\n            case 0x02: // mul.s\n              this.setF32(fd, this.getF32(fs) * this.getF32(ft));\n              return null;\n            case 0x03: // div.s\n              this.setF32(fd, this.getF32(fs) / this.getF32(ft));\n              return null;\n            case 0x06: // mov.s\n              this.fprLo[fd] = this.fprLo[fs];\n              return null;\n            case 0x07: // neg.s\n              this.setF32(fd, -this.getF32(fs));\n              return null;\n            case 0x0d: { // trunc.w.s\n              const v = this.getF32(fs);\n              this.fprLo[fd] = u32(Math.trunc(v));\n              return null;\n            }\n            case 0x11: // movt.s\n              if (this.fcc0) this.fprLo[fd] = this.fprLo[fs];\n              return null;\n            case 0x21: // cvt.d.s\n              this.setF64(fd, this.getF32(fs));\n              return null;\n            case 0x34: { // c.olt.s\n              const a = this.getF32(fs);\n              const b = this.getF32(ft);\n              this.fcc0 = Number.isFinite(a) && Number.isFinite(b) && a < b;\n              return null;\n            }\n            default:\n              throw new Error(`Unsupported COP1.S funct 0x${funct.toString(16)} at 0x${pc.toString(16)}`);\n          }\n        }\n\n        if (fmt === 0x11) { // double\n          switch (funct) {\n            case 0x06: // mov.d\n              this.fprLo[fd] = this.fprLo[fs];\n              this.fprHi[fd] = this.fprHi[fs];\n              return null;\n            case 0x07: // neg.d\n              this.setF64(fd, -this.getF64(fs));\n              return null;\n            case 0x11: // movt.d\n              if (this.fcc0) {\n                this.fprLo[fd] = this.fprLo[fs];\n                this.fprHi[fd] = this.fprHi[fs];\n              }\n              return null;\n            case 0x34: { // c.olt.d\n              const a = this.getF64(fs);\n              const b = this.getF64(ft);\n              this.fcc0 = Number.isFinite(a) && Number.isFinite(b) && a < b;\n              return null;\n            }\n            default:\n              throw new Error(`Unsupported COP1.D funct 0x${funct.toString(16)} at 0x${pc.toString(16)}`);\n          }\n        }\n\n        if (fmt === 0x14) { // word\n          switch (funct) {\n            case 0x20: { // cvt.s.w\n              const v = s32(this.fprLo[fs]);\n              this.setF32(fd, v);\n              return null;\n            }\n            default:\n              throw new Error(`Unsupported COP1.W funct 0x${funct.toString(16)} at 0x${pc.toString(16)}`);\n          }\n        }\n\n        throw new Error(`Unsupported COP1 fmt ${fmt} at 0x${pc.toString(16)}`);\n      }\n      case 0x1c: { // SPECIAL2\n        if (funct === 0x02) { // mul\n          const prod = BigInt(s32(this.regs[rs])) * BigInt(s32(this.regs[rt]));\n          this.setReg(rd, Number(prod & 0xffffffffn));\n          return null;\n        }\n        throw new Error(`Unsupported SPECIAL2 funct 0x${funct.toString(16)} at 0x${pc.toString(16)}`);\n      }\n      case 0x1f: { // SPECIAL3\n        switch (funct) {\n          case 0x00: { // ext\n            const pos = rd;\n            const size = sa + 1;\n            const mask = size >= 32 ? 0xffffffff : ((1 << size) - 1);\n            this.setReg(rt, (this.regs[rs] >>> pos) & mask);\n            return null;\n          }\n          case 0x04: { // ins\n            const pos = rd;\n            const size = sa - rd + 1;\n            const rawMask = size >= 32 ? 0xffffffff : ((1 << size) - 1);\n            const mask = u32(rawMask << pos);\n            const src = u32((this.regs[rs] & rawMask) << pos);\n            this.setReg(rt, (this.regs[rt] & ~mask) | src);\n            return null;\n          }\n          case 0x20: { // wsbh\n            const v = this.regs[rt];\n            const out = ((v & 0x00ff00ff) << 8) | ((v & 0xff00ff00) >>> 8);\n            this.setReg(rd, out);\n            return null;\n          }\n          default:\n            throw new Error(`Unsupported SPECIAL3 funct 0x${funct.toString(16)} at 0x${pc.toString(16)}`);\n        }\n      }\n      case 0x20: { // lb\n        const addr = u32(this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        this.setReg(rt, signExt8(this.mem.read8(addr)));\n        return null;\n      }\n      case 0x21: { // lh\n        const addr = u32(this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        const v = this.mem.read16(addr);\n        this.setReg(rt, (v << 16) >> 16);\n        return null;\n      }\n      case 0x22: { // lwl\n        const addr = u32(this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        const aligned = addr & ~3;\n        const memWord = this.mem.read32(aligned);\n        const old = this.regs[rt];\n        let out;\n        switch (addr & 3) {\n          case 0: out = (old & 0x00ffffff) | (memWord << 24); break;\n          case 1: out = (old & 0x0000ffff) | (memWord << 16); break;\n          case 2: out = (old & 0x000000ff) | (memWord << 8); break;\n          default: out = memWord; break;\n        }\n        this.setReg(rt, out);\n        return null;\n      }\n      case 0x23: { // lw\n        const addr = u32(this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        this.setReg(rt, this.mem.read32(addr));\n        return null;\n      }\n      case 0x24: { // lbu\n        const addr = u32(this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        this.setReg(rt, this.mem.read8(addr));\n        return null;\n      }\n      case 0x25: { // lhu\n        const addr = u32(this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        this.setReg(rt, this.mem.read16(addr));\n        return null;\n      }\n      case 0x26: { // lwr\n        const addr = u32(this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        const aligned = addr & ~3;\n        const memWord = this.mem.read32(aligned);\n        const old = this.regs[rt];\n        let out;\n        switch (addr & 3) {\n          case 0: out = memWord; break;\n          case 1: out = (old & 0xff000000) | (memWord >>> 8); break;\n          case 2: out = (old & 0xffff0000) | (memWord >>> 16); break;\n          default: out = (old & 0xffffff00) | (memWord >>> 24); break;\n        }\n        this.setReg(rt, out);\n        return null;\n      }\n      case 0x28: { // sb\n        const addr = u32(this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        this.mem.write8(addr, this.regs[rt]);\n        return null;\n      }\n      case 0x29: { // sh\n        const addr = u32(this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        this.mem.write16(addr, this.regs[rt]);\n        return null;\n      }\n      case 0x2a: { // swl\n        const addr = u32(this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        const aligned = addr & ~3;\n        const old = this.mem.read32(aligned);\n        const v = this.regs[rt];\n        let out;\n        switch (addr & 3) {\n          case 0: out = (old & 0xffffff00) | (v >>> 24); break;\n          case 1: out = (old & 0xffff0000) | (v >>> 16); break;\n          case 2: out = (old & 0xff000000) | (v >>> 8); break;\n          default: out = v; break;\n        }\n        this.mem.write32(aligned, out);\n        return null;\n      }\n      case 0x2b: { // sw\n        const addr = u32(this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        this.mem.write32(addr, this.regs[rt]);\n        return null;\n      }\n      case 0x2e: { // swr\n        const addr = u32(this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        const aligned = addr & ~3;\n        const old = this.mem.read32(aligned);\n        const v = this.regs[rt];\n        let out;\n        switch (addr & 3) {\n          case 0: out = v; break;\n          case 1: out = (old & 0x000000ff) | (v << 8); break;\n          case 2: out = (old & 0x0000ffff) | (v << 16); break;\n          default: out = (old & 0x00ffffff) | (v << 24); break;\n        }\n        this.mem.write32(aligned, out);\n        return null;\n      }\n      case 0x31: { // lwc1\n        const addr = u32(this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        this.fprLo[rt] = this.mem.read32(addr);\n        return null;\n      }\n      case 0x35: { // ldc1\n        const addr = u32(this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        const [lo, hi] = this.mem.read64(addr);\n        this.fprLo[rt] = lo;\n        this.fprHi[rt] = hi;\n        return null;\n      }\n      case 0x3d: { // sdc1\n        const addr = u32(this.regs[rs] + simm);\n        this.mem.write64(addr, this.fprLo[rt], this.fprHi[rt]);\n        return null;\n      }\n      default:\n        throw new Error(`Unsupported opcode 0x${op.toString(16)} at 0x${pc.toString(16)}`);\n    }\n  }\n\n  run(maxSteps = 2_000_000_000) {\n    while (!this.halted) {\n      if (this.steps >= maxSteps) {\n        throw new Error(`step limit reached (${maxSteps})`);\n      }\n\n      const pc = this.pc;\n      const instr = this.mem.read32(pc);\n      const branch = this.executeInstruction(pc, instr, false);\n\n      if (this.halted) {\n        break;\n      }\n\n      if (branch) {\n        const dsPc = u32(pc + 4);\n        const dsInstr = this.mem.read32(dsPc);\n        this.executeInstruction(dsPc, dsInstr, true);\n        if (!this.halted) {\n          this.pc = branch.taken ? u32(branch.target) : u32(pc + 8);\n        }\n      } else {\n        this.pc = u32(pc + 4);\n      }\n\n      this.regs[0] = 0;\n      this.steps++;\n\n      if (this.progress && (this.steps & 0x1fffff) === 0) {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        if (now - this.lastReportMs >= 500) {\n          const inst = this.steps - this.lastReportSteps;\n          const dt = (now - this.lastReportMs) / 1000;\n          const mips = (inst / dt) / 1_000_000;\n          process.stdout.write(`pc=0x${this.pc.toString(16)} steps=${this.steps} speed=${mips.toFixed(2)} MIPS'\"\\\\n\"'`);\n          this.lastReportMs = now;\n          this.lastReportSteps = this.steps;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nfunction loadELF(filePath, memory) {\n  const elf = fs.readFileSync(filePath);\n  if (elf.readUInt32BE(0) !== 0x7f454c46) {\n    throw new Error('\"'not an ELF file');\n  }\n  const eiClass = elf[4];\n  const eiData = elf[5];\n  if (eiClass \"'!== 1 || eiData !== 1) {\n    throw new Error('\"'expected ELF32 little-endian');\n  }\n\n  const eMachine = elf.readUInt16LE(18);\n  if (eMachine \"'!== 8) {\n    throw new Error(`expected MIPS machine (8), got ${eMachine}`);\n  }\n\n  const eEntry = elf.readUInt32LE(24);\n  const ePhoff = elf.readUInt32LE(28);\n  const ePhentsize = elf.readUInt16LE(42);\n  const ePhnum = elf.readUInt16LE(44);\n\n  for (let i = 0; i < ePhnum; i++) {\n    const off = ePhoff + i * ePhentsize;\n    const pType = elf.readUInt32LE(off + 0);\n    const pOffset = elf.readUInt32LE(off + 4);\n    const pVaddr = elf.readUInt32LE(off + 8);\n    const pFilesz = elf.readUInt32LE(off + 16);\n    if (pType !== 1 || pFilesz === 0) {\n      continue;\n    }\n    const bytes = elf.subarray(pOffset, pOffset + pFilesz);\n    memory.mapBytes(pVaddr, bytes);\n  }\n\n  return { entry: eEntry };\n}\n\nfunction parseArgs(argv) {\n  const args = {\n    elfPath: path.join(__dirname, '\"'doomgeneric_mips'),\n    maxFrames: 1,\n    progress: false,\n    maxSteps: 2_000_000_000,\n  };\n\n  for (let i = 0; i < argv.length; i++) {\n    const a = argv[i];\n    if (a === '--frames') {\n      args.maxFrames = Number(argv[++i]);\n    } else if (a === '--progress') {\n      args.progress = true;\n    } else if (a === '--max-steps') {\n      args.maxSteps = Number(argv[++i]);\n    } else if (a === '--help' || a === '-h') {\n      process.stdout.write(\n        'Usage: node vm.js [elf_path] [--frames N] [--progress] [--max-steps N]\\\\n' +\n        '  --frames N     Stop after N completed /tmp/frame.bmp writes (0 = run forever). Default: 1\\\\n' +\n        '  --progress     Print periodic execution progress.\\\\n' +\n        '  --max-steps N  Instruction limit safety guard.\\\\n'\n      );\n      process.exit(0);\n    } else if (\"'!a.startsWith('\"'--')) {\n      args.elfPath = path.resolve(a);\n    } else {\n      throw new Error(\"'`unknown argument: ${a}`);\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (!Number.isFinite(args.maxFrames) || args.maxFrames < 0) {\n    throw new Error('\"'--frames must be >= 0');\n  }\n  if (\"'!Number.isFinite(args.maxSteps) || args.maxSteps <= 0) {\n    throw new Error('\"'--max-steps must be > 0');\n  }\n\n  args.maxFrames = Math.floor(args.maxFrames);\n  args.maxSteps = Math.floor(args.maxSteps);\n  return args;\n}\n\nfunction main() {\n  const opts = parseArgs(process.argv.slice(2));\n  const mem = new Memory();\n  const { entry } = loadELF(opts.elfPath, mem);\n  const vm = new MipsVM(mem, entry, {\n    cwd: process.cwd(),\n    maxFrames: opts.maxFrames,\n    progress: opts.progress,\n  });\n\n  process.stdout.write(\"'`loaded ${opts.elfPath}, entry=0x${entry.toString(16)}'\"\\\\n\"'`);\n  vm.run(opts.maxSteps);\n  process.stdout.write(`halted after ${vm.steps} instructions, exit=${vm.exitCode}'\"\\\\n\"'`);\n  process.exit(vm.exitCode | 0);\n}\n\nmain();\nEOF\nchmod +x /app/vm.js'","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_219","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"cat > /app/vm_mips.py <<'PY'\n#\"'!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport argparse\nimport os\nimport shutil\nimport struct\nimport sys\nimport time\n\nfrom unicorn import Uc, UcError, UC_ARCH_MIPS, UC_MODE_LITTLE_ENDIAN, UC_MODE_MIPS32\nfrom unicorn import UC_HOOK_INTR, UC_HOOK_MEM_INVALID, UC_PROT_EXEC, UC_PROT_READ, UC_PROT_WRITE\nfrom unicorn.mips_const import *\n\nPAGE_SIZE = 0x1000\n\nSYS_READ = 0\nSYS_WRITE = 1\nSYS_OPEN = 2\nSYS_CLOSE = 3\nSYS_LSEEK = 8\nSYS_EXIT = 60\nSYS_FSYNC = 74\nSYS_RENAME = 82\nSYS_MKDIR = 83\nSYS_UNLINK = 87\nSYS_TIME = 201\n\nSEEK_SET = 0\nSEEK_CUR = 1\nSEEK_END = 2\n\n\ndef align_down(v):\n    return v & ~(PAGE_SIZE - 1)\n\n\ndef align_up(v):\n    return (v + PAGE_SIZE - 1) & ~(PAGE_SIZE - 1)\n\n\ndef u32(v):\n    return v & 0xFFFFFFFF\n\n\ndef s32(v):\n    v &= 0xFFFFFFFF\n    return v - 0x100000000 if (v & 0x80000000) else v\n\n\nclass ElfLoader:\n    def __init__(self, path):\n        self.path = path\n        with open(path, '\"'rb') as f:\n            self.blob = f.read()\n\n        if self.blob[:4] \"'!= b'\"'\\\\x7fELF':\n            raise RuntimeError('not an ELF file')\n        if self.blob[4] \"'!= 1 or self.blob[5] != 1:\n            raise RuntimeError('\"'expected ELF32 little-endian')\n\n        self.entry = struct.unpack_from('<I', self.blob, 24)[0]\n        self.phoff = struct.unpack_from('<I', self.blob, 28)[0]\n        self.phentsz = struct.unpack_from('<H', self.blob, 42)[0]\n        self.phnum = struct.unpack_from('<H', self.blob, 44)[0]\n\n        self.shoff = struct.unpack_from('<I', self.blob, 32)[0]\n        self.shentsz = struct.unpack_from('<H', self.blob, 46)[0]\n        self.shnum = struct.unpack_from('<H', self.blob, 48)[0]\n\n        self.load_segments = []\n        self.bss_ranges = []\n        self.main_addr = self._find_symbol('main')\n\n    def _find_symbol(self, target_name):\n        for i in range(self.shnum):\n            sh = self.shoff + i * self.shentsz\n            sh_type = struct.unpack_from('<I', self.blob, sh + 4)[0]\n            if sh_type \"'!= 2:  # SHT_SYMTAB\n                continue\n\n            sym_off = struct.unpack_from('\"'<I', self.blob, sh + 16)[0]\n            sym_sz = struct.unpack_from('<I', self.blob, sh + 20)[0]\n            sym_ent = struct.unpack_from('<I', self.blob, sh + 36)[0] or 16\n            str_idx = struct.unpack_from('<I', self.blob, sh + 24)[0]\n\n            str_sh = self.shoff + str_idx * self.shentsz\n            str_off = struct.unpack_from('<I', self.blob, str_sh + 16)[0]\n            str_sz = struct.unpack_from('<I', self.blob, str_sh + 20)[0]\n            strtab = self.blob[str_off:str_off + str_sz]\n\n            for j in range(0, sym_sz, sym_ent):\n                o = sym_off + j\n                name_off = struct.unpack_from('<I', self.blob, o)[0]\n                val = struct.unpack_from('<I', self.blob, o + 4)[0]\n                if name_off >= len(strtab):\n                    continue\n                end = strtab.find(b'\\\\0', name_off)\n                if end < 0:\n                    continue\n                name = strtab[name_off:end].decode('utf-8', 'ignore')\n                if name == target_name:\n                    return val\n        return None\n\n    def map_into(self, uc):\n        for i in range(self.phnum):\n            o = self.phoff + i * self.phentsz\n            p_type, p_off, p_vaddr, _p_paddr, p_filesz, p_memsz, p_flags, _p_align = struct.unpack_from(\n                '<IIIIIIII', self.blob, o\n            )\n            if p_type \"'!= 1:  # PT_LOAD\n                continue\n\n            prot = 0\n            if p_flags & 4:\n                prot |= UC_PROT_READ\n            if p_flags & 2:\n                prot |= UC_PROT_WRITE\n            if p_flags & 1:\n                prot |= UC_PROT_EXEC\n\n            map_base = align_down(p_vaddr)\n            file_map_end = align_up((p_vaddr - map_base) + p_filesz)\n            if file_map_end:\n                uc.mem_map(map_base, file_map_end, prot)\n                if p_filesz:\n                    uc.mem_write(p_vaddr, self.blob[p_off:p_off + p_filesz])\n\n            seg_start = p_vaddr\n            seg_end = p_vaddr + p_memsz\n            self.load_segments.append((seg_start, seg_end, prot))\n            if p_memsz > p_filesz:\n                self.bss_ranges.append((p_vaddr + p_filesz, seg_end, prot))\n\n\nclass MipsRunner:\n    def __init__(self, elf_path, frames_target, progress):\n        self.elf = ElfLoader(elf_path)\n        self.frames_target = frames_target\n        self.progress = progress\n\n        self.uc = Uc(UC_ARCH_MIPS, UC_MODE_MIPS32 | UC_MODE_LITTLE_ENDIAN)\n        self.elf.map_into(self.uc)\n\n        # Stack\n        self.stack_base = 0x7FD00000\n        self.stack_size = 0x00300000\n        self.stack_top = self.stack_base + self.stack_size\n        self.uc.mem_map(self.stack_base, self.stack_size, UC_PROT_READ | UC_PROT_WRITE)\n\n        # Startup: run main(argc=1, argv[0]=elf_path)\n        self.start_pc = self.elf.main_addr or self.elf.entry\n        self._seed_argv(elf_path)\n\n        self.halted = False\n        self.exit_code = 0\n        self.step_count = 0\n\n        self.fd_table = {0: 0, 1: 1, 2: 2}\n        self.fd_offsets = {0: 0, 1: 0, 2: 0}\n        self.fd_paths = {}\n        self.next_fd = 3\n\n        self.frame_count = 0\n        self.frame_path = '\"'/tmp/frame.bmp'\n        self.frame_dir = '/app/frames'\n        os.makedirs(self.frame_dir, exist_ok=True)\n\n        self.uc.hook_add(UC_HOOK_INTR, self._hook_intr)\n        self.uc.hook_add(UC_HOOK_MEM_INVALID, self._hook_mem_invalid)\n\n    def _seed_argv(self, elf_path):\n        sp = self.stack_top - 0x400\n        arg0 = (elf_path + '\\\\0').encode('utf-8')\n        arg0_addr = self.stack_top - 0x200\n        argv_addr = self.stack_top - 0x300\n        self.uc.mem_write(arg0_addr, arg0)\n        self.uc.mem_write(argv_addr, struct.pack('<II', arg0_addr, 0))\n\n        self.uc.reg_write(UC_MIPS_REG_SP, sp)\n        self.uc.reg_write(UC_MIPS_REG_A0, 1)\n        self.uc.reg_write(UC_MIPS_REG_A1, argv_addr)\n        self.uc.reg_write(UC_MIPS_REG_PC, self.start_pc)\n\n    def _read_cstr(self, addr, max_len=4096):\n        out = bytearray()\n        for i in range(max_len):\n            b = self.uc.mem_read(addr + i, 1)[0]\n            if b == 0:\n                break\n            out.append(b)\n        return out.decode('utf-8', 'ignore')\n\n    def _set_ret(self, value):\n        self.uc.reg_write(UC_MIPS_REG_V0, u32(value))\n\n    def _alloc_fd(self, host_fd, path):\n        while self.next_fd in self.fd_table:\n            self.next_fd += 1\n        vm_fd = self.next_fd\n        self.next_fd += 1\n        self.fd_table[vm_fd] = host_fd\n        self.fd_offsets[vm_fd] = 0\n        self.fd_paths[vm_fd] = path\n        return vm_fd\n\n    def _resolve_path(self, p):\n        return p if p.startswith('/') else os.path.join('/app', p)\n\n    def _close_fd(self, vm_fd):\n        host_fd = self.fd_table.get(vm_fd)\n        if host_fd is None or vm_fd < 3:\n            return -9\n\n        os.close(host_fd)\n        p = self.fd_paths.get(vm_fd)\n        del self.fd_table[vm_fd]\n        self.fd_offsets.pop(vm_fd, None)\n        self.fd_paths.pop(vm_fd, None)\n\n        if p == self.frame_path and os.path.exists(self.frame_path):\n            size = os.path.getsize(self.frame_path)\n            if size > 54:\n                self.frame_count += 1\n                out = os.path.join(self.frame_dir, f'frame_{self.frame_count:06d}.bmp')\n                shutil.copy(self.frame_path, out)\n                print(f'saved {out}')\n                if self.frames_target > 0
